_note: Label Sprint round for frog — generated frog_illus.webp, cropped/keyed dark mode.
caption: Tap each label, then tap where it belongs on the frog.

hotspots.label: Eye
hotspots.detail: Bulging eyes give the frog a wide field of vision.

hotspots.label: Tympanum
hotspots.detail: The circular external ear membrane, just behind the eye.

hotspots.label: Nostril (naris)
hotspots.detail: Paired external openings used for breathing air.

hotspots.label: Forelimb
hotspots.detail: The shorter front leg, used to prop up the body.

hotspots.label: Webbed hind foot
hotspots.detail: Broad webbing between the toes aids swimming.

hotspots.label: Dorsolateral fold
hotspots.detail: A ridge of skin running down each side of the back.
